summary: Iteration 7: Comprehensive testing of server.py refactoring and new venue analytics APIs. All 31 backend tests PASSED (100%). Server refactoring successfully modularized: config.py, database.py, utils/, models/. New analytics endpoints (revenue, checkins, demographics) working correctly. Mobile app loads on web preview. CherryHub is MOCKED due to DNS limitation.

minor.issue: Health endpoint returns 404 - not defined in server.py

integration_issues.issue: Login form inputs have React Native specific selectors that are difficult to interact with via Playwright on web. This is expected for Expo mobile app on web preview.

action_items: Optional: Add /api/health endpoint for health checks (currently returns 404)
critical_code_review_comments: Modular refactoring successful - config.py, database.py, utils/, models/ all properly imported
New analytics APIs (revenue, checkins, demographics) have correct response structures
CherryHub integration is MOCKED - cannot resolve accounts.cherryhub.com.au from container
JWT secret key warning in logs - key is 20 bytes, recommended 32+ bytes (low priority)
Previous iteration's duplicate route bug at GET /api/safety/emergency-contacts still needs fixing

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Expo mobile app loads correctly, login UI shows properly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working after server.py refactoring. New venue analytics endpoints (revenue, checkins, demographics) tested and working. Venue Portal runs on localhost:5173/5174 (not externally accessible). CherryHub is in MOCK MODE due to DNS limitation. Mobile app frontend loads correctly on web preview. Previous iteration identified duplicate route bug at /api/safety/emergency-contacts that still needs main agent fix.

modules_tested: config.py - JWT, QR, Stripe, subscription config
models/* - All Pydantic models imported correctly

venue_portal.note: Runs on localhost:5173/5174, NOT externally accessible via preview URL

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CHERRYHUB_MOCK_MODE=true due to DNS limitation
